personal.name: Bouziani Ahmed Aness
personal.title: Computer Science Student, Full-Stack & Mobile Developer
bio: I'm Aness, a second-year CS student at ESI Algiers building useful products across web, mobile, and backend.
I turn ideas into practical tools — from student productivity apps and local service platforms to internal systems and desktop utilities.
Active member of ETIC. Interested in clean architecture, thoughtful interfaces, and Discord bots.

projects.label: Sequence
projects.description: A GitHub-style contribution-graph habit tracker for iOS — every day is a square, so you build streaks you don't want to break. Local-first, built with SwiftUI and SwiftData.

projects.label: JO3T
projects.description: A Flutter mobile app for discovering places, food, and local experiences across Algeria — simple, fast, and community-driven.

projects.label: Ba33-AUP
projects.description: Algeria's NFN wool traceability platform — a monorepo with a NestJS/PostgreSQL backend, three Flutter mobile apps (Collector, Shepherd, Transporter), and dedicated web portals, built on a strict feature-based MVVM architecture with Riverpod and a shared design system.

projects.label: Student Planner
projects.description: A mobile student planner helping students stay organized with schedules, tasks, and day-to-day academic planning in one clean experience.

projects.label: Port-Flow
projects.description: A port terminal booking platform with role-based management for Admins, Operators, Carriers, and Drivers. Includes carrier registration, operational coordination, and connected web and mobile workflows.

projects.label: Nearby
projects.description: A location-based marketplace platform that helps clients discover and book professional services in their immediate area, creating a smoother connection between local demand and nearby providers.

projects.label: Pomodoro-macOS
projects.description: An offline macOS Pomodoro timer app designed as a small floating utility window with a pixel-art inspired style, plus a WidgetKit widget that shows quick daily focus stats at a glance.

projects.label: Brume
projects.description: A calm, hand-drawn iOS journal where your words and sketches live on the same page — tap to write, switch to draw, set a mood and let it go. Warm hand-crafted aesthetic, 100% local, nothing ever uploaded.

projects.label: Movio
projects.description: A mobile movie discovery app that helps users explore films, save favorites, mark watched titles, and manage a personal viewing profile in one clean experience.

projects.label: DoctorCom
projects.description: An AI-powered medical cabinet platform for managing patient records, appointments, and clinic workflows — built with TypeScript for speed and scalability, with smart automation and secure data handling.

projects.label: FocusNotch
projects.description: A Pomodoro timer that lives in your MacBook's notch — glanceable countdown and sessions, hover to expand, one-tap Do Not Disturb. Native SwiftUI for macOS 14+.

projects.label: AppXray
projects.description: An independent privacy and capability auditor for macOS apps — reads what an app can really do straight from the binary and code signature, 100% offline. No App Store self-declarations, just the truth.

projects.label: MacAgentKit
projects.description: The missing low-level toolkit for macOS automation and AI agents — a clean, dependency-free Swift package that handles TCC permissions, the Accessibility API, Control Center, Shortcuts, and input synthesis so your app doesn't have to.

projects.label: E-Commerce Template
projects.description: A full-stack e-commerce web app template with a clean responsive UI — includes authentication, product and catalog management, cart and checkout flow, and an admin dashboard to quickly launch and customize an online store.

projects.label: ETIC Platform
projects.description: A platform for managing ETIC's external relations, partnerships, and coordination workflows with a more organized and collaborative system.

projects.label: Contact Platform
projects.description: A platform focused on streamlining contact management and communication flows through a cleaner, more structured digital experience.

timeline.title: First Baccalaureate
timeline.description: Earned my first baccalaureate in 2023, marking the beginning of my higher-education journey and the next step toward engineering and computer science.

timeline.title: Autonomous Systems Studies
timeline.org: National Higher School of Autonomous Systems
timeline.description: Completed one year of study in autonomous systems, then earned a second baccalaureate in 2024 as part of that academic path.

timeline.title: Second Baccalaureate
timeline.description: Earned a second baccalaureate in 2024, opening the path into the computer science field and the ESI Algiers program.

timeline.title: Computer Science Student
timeline.org: National Higher School of Computer Science, ESI Algiers
timeline.description: Currently in my second year, building strong foundations in computer science while continuing to grow through hands-on product work across web, mobile, and backend development.

timeline.title: Active Member
timeline.description: Active member since 2024, contributing to club initiatives and projects, including work around external relations and internal digital platforms.

timeline.title: Event Coordinator
timeline.description: Coordinated the 17th edition of S2EE, organizing teams, logistics, and partners to deliver the event with ETIC.
